business_problem: Ford's nearly 170,000 employees worked across multiple fragmented collaboration platforms—developers in one tool, business teams in another, meetings in a third—creating communication silos, slowing productivity, and complicating support, training, and supplier collaboration across hundreds of global locations.
solution_summary: Ford migrated 170,000 employees across 100+ global locations to Microsoft Teams with Teams Premium, consolidating fragmented communication platforms into a unified collaboration hub. The solution integrates with Power Apps for custom workflow automation, SharePoint for centralized document management, and OneDrive for personal file storage. Teams Premium delivers AI-powered meeting summaries, action item tracking, and speaker-attributed transcripts, while built-in encryption and watermarking protect sensitive discussions. Integration with Microsoft 365 provides identity, security, and compliance controls at enterprise scale. The platform supports hybrid work through Teams Rooms, federated external collaboration with strategic partners, and low-code app development through Power Platform, enabling employees to automate tasks and manage projects without IT dependency.
business_outcome: Ford unified collaboration onto a single secure platform, doubled employee satisfaction scores for collaboration, saved millions by consolidating tools, reduced help-desk tickets and onboarding complexity, accelerated cross-functional and external-partner collaboration, and built a foundation for embedding agentic AI into workflows.
metrics: Nearly 170,000 employees unified on Microsoft Teams
Doubled employee satisfaction scores for collaboration
Saving millions by using a single collaboration tool
architecture_clues: Custom Teams connectors for migrating 30/90/365 days of historical channels, meetings, and chat
Power Apps hosted inside Teams; SharePoint and OneDrive integration
Teams Premium AI-powered meeting notes and intelligent recap
Watermarking and end-to-end encryption for sensitive meetings
Teams federation with external partners via shared channels
Existing conferencing hardware re-used with Microsoft Teams Rooms software
evidence_quotes: Teams became the place where work happens. We’ve doubled our satisfaction scores for collaboration and are saving millions by using a single tool.
Our number one challenge was inconsistencies with how a device is delivered.
Users could choose how much content to bring over: 30 days, 90 days, or a full year.
With Teams federation, Ford is engaging external partners in shared channels, reducing email volume and improving responsiveness.

solution_components.name: Microsoft Teams
solution_components.role: Central platform for unified communications, meetings, chat, and team collaboration across all organizational levels.

solution_components.name: Microsoft Teams Premium
solution_components.role: Delivers AI-powered meeting notes, transcription with speaker attribution, and advanced security features like watermarking and end-to-end encryption.

solution_components.name: Power Apps
solution_components.role: Enables low-code application development for custom workflows, project tracking, and business logic embedded within Teams.

solution_components.name: SharePoint
solution_components.role: Provides centralized document management, versioning, and team site collaboration for organized project work and cross-functional initiatives.

solution_components.name: OneDrive
solution_components.role: Offers secure personal file storage and cloud synchronization for individual document management and access.

solution_components.name: Microsoft 365
solution_components.role: Provides identity, security, and compliance infrastructure underpinning all communications and data governance.

solution_components.name: Microsoft Teams Rooms
solution_components.role: Enables modern hybrid meeting experiences through integrated hardware and software for distributed teams globally.

data_flow: Employee communications, chat histories, and meeting content flow into Teams as the central hub. Documents are managed through SharePoint for team collaboration or OneDrive for personal storage. Meeting sessions generate transcripts and action items processed by Teams Premium AI features, which surface summaries and decisions. Power Apps built on Power Platform enable custom data flows for specific business processes. All data is governed through Microsoft 365 security and compliance controls, with audit trails maintained for regulatory requirements.
integration_points: Internal enterprise applications and departmental workflows
External partner networks via Teams federation
SharePoint team sites and document repositories
Power Platform for low-code application integration
Hardware conferencing systems via Teams Rooms
